name: Getting unstuck on first drafts
description: Overcome blank page paralysis and generate initial draft material that you can shape and refine.

name: Rewriting for tone and audience
description: Adjust your message for different audiences and tones—from formal to conversational, executive to frontline.

name: Summarizing long documents
description: Distill lengthy reports, research, and documents into clear, actionable summaries for busy stakeholders.

name: Building better presentations
description: Develop compelling slide decks with clear narratives, speaker notes, and visual storytelling that engages audiences.

name: Writing emails that get read
description: Craft subject lines, body copy, and calls-to-action that cut through inbox noise and drive response.

name: Drafting speeches and remarks
description: Generate compelling remarks for town halls, events, and video messages that connect with your audience.

name: Preparing for meetings with AI
description: Build agendas, talking points, and briefing materials that set you up to lead effective meetings.

name: Repurposing content across channels
description: Transform one piece of content into multiple formats—articles into social posts, speeches into emails, reports into newsletters.

name: AI as an editing partner
description: Use AI to spot grammar, clarity, tone, and structural issues before you hit send or publish.

name: Brainstorming with AI
description: Generate fresh angles, headlines, campaign ideas, and creative directions faster than traditional brainstorming.

name: Turning data into stories
description: Convert metrics, numbers, and research into narratives that move audiences and drive decision-making.

name: AI for internal communications
description: Develop employee messaging, change communication, and engagement content that builds alignment and trust.

name: Prepping for media interviews
description: Build interview talking points, practice tough questions, and prepare messaging that stays on point.

name: AI and crisis communications
description: Develop response statements, FAQs, and rapid messaging when you need to respond quickly and thoughtfully.

name: Writing better prompts
description: Learn prompt techniques that help AI deliver more useful, accurate, and audience-appropriate output.

name: Getting past AI anxiety
description: Address fears about AI replacing writers, concerns about quality, and build confidence in using AI as a tool.

name: Plain language and accessibility
description: Simplify complex language, remove jargon, and create content that's readable and accessible to all audiences.

name: Building newsletters faster
description: Generate newsletter content, curate stories, write headlines, and manage editorial calendars more efficiently.

name: Writing stakeholder updates
description: Create executive summaries, progress reports, and status updates that keep key stakeholders aligned and informed.

name: Social media content with AI
description: Write posts, captions, and threads optimized for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, and other social platforms.

name: Research and synthesis
description: Analyze research, synthesize findings into key insights, and communicate discoveries to non-specialist audiences.

name: Handling feedback and revisions
description: Incorporate feedback efficiently, manage multiple edit rounds, and keep documents on brand while staying flexible.

name: Writing for the intranet
description: Create intranet articles, how-to guides, and employee resources that are clear, scannable, and findable.

name: Digital signage content
description: Write compelling messages for displays, wayfinding, and screens that catch attention and communicate quickly.

name: Trust and transparency with AI
description: Communicate AI's role in your organization clearly and authentically, addressing concerns and building stakeholder trust.
